name: ExactTarget, Inc.
description: ExactTarget, Inc. was a global provider of on-demand email marketing and interactive marketing software-as-a-service solutions. Founded in 2000, the company's suite of applications allowed organizations of all sizes to design, send, and track email, mobile, social, and web campaigns. ExactTarget was acquired by Salesforce in 2013 for $2.5 billion and subsequently integrated into the Salesforce Marketing Cloud.
